highlights.title: Fix Meals macros showing zero for today
changes: Today's meal macros (carbs, fat, protein) now appear correctly in the Stats Meals view.
The Meals chart no longer shows zeros for the current day caused by a midnight-boundary filter bug.
Week, month, and total ranges continue to behave the same as before.

sources.title: nightscout/Trio#1188: Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day

highlights.title: Show indefinite override in Live Activity chart
changes: Indefinite overrides now appear as a visible bar in the Live Activity chart.
Indefinite overrides are drawn to extend about 2 hours forward so they fit the chart view.

sources.title: nightscout/Trio#1192: Fix indefinite override not drawn in Live Activity chart
Fix indefinite override not drawn in Live Activity chart

includedPullRequests.title: Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day
includedPullRequests.body:
## Summary 
* `calculateAveragesForDateRange` filtered cached daily totals with a strict `date >= startDate` against day-keys that are startOfDay. The .day-interval
* initial scroll position is startOfDay(today) + 1s, which leaves today's `today 00:00:00` bucket just outside the range, zeroing today's carbs/fat/protein in the Meals chart (reported as #1181).
* Scrolling slightly back into yesterday made today appear again.

## Fix
* Compare against the day window (overlap semantics) instead of the day's start instant: a cached day belongs in the range if any moment of it overlaps.
* Backward-compatible for `.week`/`.month`/`.total` because those intervals already align `startDate` to midnight.

## Additional Change
* Simplify calculateAndCacheDailyAverages (no behavior change) 
* `dailyMealStats` is already one entry per day from `fetchMealStats`, so the previous `Dictionary(grouping:)` and per-group reduce + divide-by-count was a passthrough (count==1, total/1==total).
* Replace with a direct `Dictionary(_, uniquingKeysWith:)` re-key by `startOfDay`, keeping the defensive sum-merge in case a future caller constructs MealStats with mid-day timestamps.

---

Addresses #1181.

includedPullRequests.title: Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day
includedPullRequests.body:
## Summary 
* `calculateAveragesForDateRange` filtered cached daily totals with a strict `date >= startDate` against day-keys that are startOfDay. The .day-interval
* initial scroll position is startOfDay(today) + 1s, which leaves today's `today 00:00:00` bucket just outside the range, zeroing today's carbs/fat/protein in the Meals chart (reported as #1181).
* Scrolling slightly back into yesterday made today appear again.

## Fix
* Compare against the day window (overlap semantics) instead of the day's start instant: a cached day belongs in the range if any moment of it overlaps.
* Backward-compatible for `.week`/`.month`/`.total` because those intervals already align `startDate` to midnight.

## Additional Change
* Simplify calculateAndCacheDailyAverages (no behavior change) 
* `dailyMealStats` is already one entry per day from `fetchMealStats`, so the previous `Dictionary(grouping:)` and per-group reduce + divide-by-count was a passthrough (count==1, total/1==total).
* Replace with a direct `Dictionary(_, uniquingKeysWith:)` re-key by `startOfDay`, keeping the defensive sum-merge in case a future caller constructs MealStats with mid-day timestamps.

---

Addresses #1181.

includedPullRequests.title: Fix indefinite override not drawn in Live Activity chart
includedPullRequests.body:
When override duration is 0 (indefinite), end date equaled start date, giving the RuleMark zero width and preventing it from rendering. Treat duration == 0 as indefinite and extend the bar to now + 2 hours, matching the chart's x-axis domain.

Fixes #1191

Fixes #1191
